requirement_topic.en: Energy-Efficiency Performance — GSO Energy-Efficiency Standard for Lighting
requirement_topic.zh: 能效性能——GSO 照明能效标准
requirement_topic.zht: 能效性能——GSO 照明能效標準

summary.en: Bahrain regulates the energy performance of lighting through the GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) energy-efficiency framework for low-energy / LED lamps and lighting, adopted and enforced locally by BSMD under MOIC. The GSO lighting energy-efficiency standard sets minimum luminous-efficacy (lm/W) thresholds and supporting performance criteria (such as rated lifetime and lumen maintenance) for regulated lamp and luminaire categories; products below the minimum efficacy band cannot obtain the GSO energy-efficiency label and may be refused market access. Performance is assessed at the Bahrain supply of 230 V, 50 Hz. The exact efficacy thresholds and band boundaries are defined in the current GSO lighting energy-efficiency standard and must be verified for the specific product sub-category.
summary.zh: 巴林通过 GSO（海湾标准化组织）针对低能耗/LED 灯及照明的能效框架来规范照明的能效，并由 MOIC 下属 BSMD 在当地采纳和执行。GSO 照明能效标准为受管制的灯和灯具类别设定最低光效（lm/W）阈值及支撑性性能指标（如额定寿命和光通维持率）；低于最低光效区间的产品无法取得 GSO 能效标签，并可能被拒绝市场准入。性能在巴林 230 V、50 Hz 电源下评估。确切的光效阈值及区间边界由现行 GSO 照明能效标准规定，须针对具体产品子类别核实。
summary.zht: 巴林通過 GSO（海灣標準化組織）針對低能耗/LED 燈及照明的能效框架來規範照明的能效，並由 MOIC 下屬 BSMD 在當地採納和執行。GSO 照明能效標準為受管制的燈和燈具類別設定最低光效（lm/W）閾值及支撐性性能指標（如額定壽命和光通維持率）；低於最低光效區間的產品無法取得 GSO 能效標籤，並可能被拒絕市場准入。性能在巴林 230 V、50 Hz 電源下評估。確切的光效閾值及區間邊界由現行 GSO 照明能效標準規定，須針對具體產品子類別核實。

standards_or_laws: GSO energy-efficiency standard for lighting / low-energy lamps (GCC Standardization Organization) — minimum efficacy and performance requirements
BSMD (MOIC) — local adoption and enforcement of the GSO lighting energy-efficiency requirements

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which defines three energy-efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) >= 90 lm/W; Grade 2 >= 80 lm/W; Grade 3 >= 70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China, and China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products. The grade boundaries (absolute lm/W) are defined under the Chinese scheme administered by SAMR; they are not the same band structure as the GSO lighting energy-efficiency standard.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）>= 90 lm/W；2 级 >= 80 lm/W；3 级 >= 70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求，且中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求。等级边界（绝对 lm/W）由 SAMR 管理的中国方案规定；其区间结构与 GSO 照明能效标准并不相同。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）>= 90 lm/W；2 級 >= 80 lm/W；3 級 >= 70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求，且中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求。等級邊界（絕對 lm/W）由 SAMR 管理的中國方案規定；其區間結構與 GSO 照明能效標準並不相同。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both schemes are efficacy-driven, but the band structures and minimum thresholds differ and are not mutually recognised. Key gaps: (1) a product's CN Grade does not map onto the GSO efficiency band — the exporter must verify the product's lm/W against the current GSO lighting energy-efficiency thresholds for the specific sub-category; products meeting only the lowest CN grade may fail the GSO minimum; (2) the GSO standard may include supporting criteria (e.g., rated lifetime, lumen maintenance, power factor) that differ from GB 30255 — confirm the full GSO performance set; (3) performance must be valid at 230 V, 50 Hz (Bahrain) rather than 220 V (China); (4) compliance is evidenced to BSMD via the in-country importer, not via the China Energy Label registration. Verify the exact current GSO efficacy thresholds before assuming a CN-graded product qualifies.
gap.zh: 两套方案均以光效为导向，但区间结构和最低阈值不同且不互认。主要差距：（1）产品的中国等级不能映射到 GSO 能效区间——出口商须按现行 GSO 照明能效阈值针对具体子类别核实产品的 lm/W；仅达中国最低等级的产品可能无法满足 GSO 最低要求；（2）GSO 标准可能包含与 GB 30255 不同的支撑性指标（如额定寿命、光通维持率、功率因数）——须确认完整的 GSO 性能集；（3）性能须在 230 V、50 Hz（巴林）而非 220 V（中国）下有效；（4）合格评定经当地进口商向 BSMD 提交，而非通过中国能效标识注册。在假设中国分级产品合格前，请核实确切的现行 GSO 光效阈值。
gap.zht: 兩套方案均以光效為導向，但區間結構和最低閾值不同且不互認。主要差距：（1）產品的中國等級不能映射到 GSO 能效區間——出口商須按現行 GSO 照明能效閾值針對具體子類別核實產品的 lm/W；僅達中國最低等級的產品可能無法滿足 GSO 最低要求；（2）GSO 標準可能包含與 GB 30255 不同的支撐性指標（如額定壽命、光通維持率、功率因數）——須確認完整的 GSO 性能集；（3）性能須在 230 V、50 Hz（巴林）而非 220 V（中國）下有效；（4）合格評定經當地進口商向 BSMD 提交，而非通過中國能效標識注冊。在假設中國分級產品合格前，請核實確切的現行 GSO 光效閾值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — minimum energy-efficiency performance per the GSO lighting energy-efficiency standard required to obtain the GSO energy label and gain BSMD market access in Bahrain
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (>= 70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted by Bahrain via BSMD/MOIC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain regulates lighting energy performance through the GSO lighting energy-efficiency standard, enforced by BSMD under MOIC. A product's China GB 30255 grade does not map directly onto the GSO efficiency band, and a product meeting only the lowest CN grade may fail the GSO minimum. Verify the product's lm/W and supporting performance against the current GSO thresholds for the specific sub-category at 230 V, 50 Hz before assuming qualification; conformity is evidenced to BSMD via the in-country importer, not via China Energy Label registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林通过 GSO 照明能效标准规范照明能效，由 MOIC 下属 BSMD 执行。产品的中国 GB 30255 等级不能直接映射到 GSO 能效区间，仅达中国最低等级的产品可能无法满足 GSO 最低要求。在假设合格前，请按现行 GSO 阈值在 230 V、50 Hz 下针对具体子类别核实产品的 lm/W 及支撑性性能；合格评定经当地进口商向 BSMD 提交，而非通过中国能效标识注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林通過 GSO 照明能效標準規範照明能效，由 MOIC 下屬 BSMD 執行。產品的中國 GB 30255 等級不能直接映射到 GSO 能效區間，僅達中國最低等級的產品可能無法滿足 GSO 最低要求。在假設合格前，請按現行 GSO 閾值在 230 V、50 Hz 下針對具體子類別核實產品的 lm/W 及支撐性性能；合格評定經當地進口商向 BSMD 提交，而非通過中國能效標識注冊。

requirement_topic.en: GSO Energy-Efficiency Label + Registration (Gulf Lighting Energy Label)
requirement_topic.zh: GSO 能效标签 + 注册（海湾照明能效标签）
requirement_topic.zht: GSO 能效標籤 + 注冊（海灣照明能效標籤）

summary.en: Regulated LED lamps and lighting placed on the Bahrain market must carry the GSO energy-efficiency label (the Gulf low-energy lamp / lighting energy label) and complete the associated registration before market placement, as adopted and enforced by BSMD under MOIC. The label communicates the product's energy-efficiency class/band derived from its measured efficacy against the GSO lighting energy-efficiency standard, and is typically applied to the product and/or packaging supplied into Bahrain. Registration is handled through the in-country importer; supporting efficacy test data should come from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory and reflect the 230 V, 50 Hz supply. Label content and language (Arabic and/or English) must follow BSMD import marking requirements.
summary.zh: 在巴林市场销售的受管制 LED 灯及照明产品须在上市前贴附 GSO 能效标签（海湾低能耗灯/照明能效标签）并完成相关注册，由 MOIC 下属 BSMD 采纳和执行。该标签传达产品依据 GSO 照明能效标准、由实测光效得出的能效等级/区间，通常贴附于供应巴林的产品和/或包装上。注册通过当地进口商办理；支撑性光效检测数据应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室并反映 230 V、50 Hz 电源。标签内容及语言（阿拉伯语和/或英语）须遵循 BSMD 进口标记要求。
summary.zht: 在巴林市場銷售的受管制 LED 燈及照明產品須在上市前貼附 GSO 能效標籤（海灣低能耗燈/照明能效標籤）並完成相關注冊，由 MOIC 下屬 BSMD 採納和執行。該標籤傳達產品依據 GSO 照明能效標準、由實測光效得出的能效等級/區間，通常貼附於供應巴林的產品和/或包裝上。注冊通過當地進口商辦理；支撐性光效檢測數據應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室並反映 230 V、50 Hz 電源。標籤內容及語言（阿拉伯語和/或英語）須遵循 BSMD 進口標記要求。

standards_or_laws: GSO energy-efficiency labelling scheme for lighting / low-energy lamps (GCC Standardization Organization) — energy label and registration
BSMD (MOIC) — local registration and label-marking enforcement (Arabic and/or English)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered with CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL, which shows Grade 1-3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the GSO energy-label registry and the CN CEL registration scheme, and the label layouts and class definitions differ.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前向中国质量认证中心（CQC）或中国节能产品认证（CECP）注册，标识依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1-3 级。GSO 能效标签登记系统与中国能效标识注册方案之间不存在互认，标签布局及等级定义亦不相同。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前向中國質量認證中心（CQC）或中國節能產品認證（CECP）注冊，標識依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1-3 級。GSO 能效標籤登記系統與中國能效標識注冊方案之間不存在互認，標籤布局及等級定義亦不相同。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: The GSO energy label and registration are mandatory pre-market steps for Bahrain with no transfer from the Chinese CEL: (1) the product must be separately registered through the in-country importer under the GSO/BSMD scheme — CN CEL registration with CQC/CECP does not substitute; (2) the GSO label class/band is derived from the GSO efficiency standard, while the CN CEL grade uses absolute lm/W thresholds — they are not directly comparable, so a CN grade cannot be re-printed as a GSO class; (3) the GSO label and supporting marking must meet BSMD language requirements (Arabic and/or English), unlike Chinese-only CEL packaging; (4) supporting efficacy data should be at 230 V, 50 Hz from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory. Exporters must redesign the label artwork to the GSO layout and complete the GSO/BSMD registration before shipment.
gap.zh: GSO 能效标签及注册是巴林强制性上市前步骤，且不能由中国 CEL 转移：（1）产品须经当地进口商按 GSO/BSMD 方案单独注册——中国向 CQC/CECP 的 CEL 注册不可替代；（2）GSO 标签等级/区间由 GSO 能效标准得出，而中国 CEL 等级采用绝对 lm/W 阈值——两者不可直接比较，故中国等级不能直接印作 GSO 等级；（3）GSO 标签及支撑性标记须满足 BSMD 语言要求（阿拉伯语和/或英语），不同于仅中文的 CEL 包装；（4）支撑性光效数据应在 230 V、50 Hz 下由 ILAC MRA 认可实验室出具。出口商须将标签设计重做为 GSO 布局，并在出货前完成 GSO/BSMD 注册。
gap.zht: GSO 能效標籤及注冊是巴林強制性上市前步驟，且不能由中國 CEL 轉移：（1）產品須經當地進口商按 GSO/BSMD 方案單獨注冊——中國向 CQC/CECP 的 CEL 注冊不可替代；（2）GSO 標籤等級/區間由 GSO 能效標準得出，而中國 CEL 等級採用絕對 lm/W 閾值——兩者不可直接比較，故中國等級不能直接印作 GSO 等級；（3）GSO 標籤及支撐性標記須滿足 BSMD 語言要求（阿拉伯語和/或英語），不同於僅中文的 CEL 包裝；（4）支撐性光效數據應在 230 V、50 Hz 下由 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室出具。出口商須將標籤設計重做為 GSO 布局，並在出貨前完成 GSO/BSMD 注冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GSO energy-efficiency label and associated registration required before Bahrain market placement under the GSO scheme as enforced by BSMD/MOIC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The GSO energy-efficiency label and registration are mandatory pre-market steps for regulated LED lighting in Bahrain, enforced by BSMD under MOIC and handled through the in-country importer. The Chinese CEL registration does not substitute, and the GSO label class (from the GSO efficiency standard) and CN CEL grade (absolute lm/W) are calculated differently and cannot be directly cross-mapped. Exporters must register under the GSO/BSMD scheme, redesign the label to the GSO layout in Arabic and/or English, and base it on efficacy data measured at 230 V, 50 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GSO 能效标签及注册是巴林受管制 LED 照明的强制性上市前步骤，由 MOIC 下属 BSMD 执行并通过当地进口商办理。中国 CEL 注册不可替代，且 GSO 标签等级（来自 GSO 能效标准）与中国 CEL 等级（绝对 lm/W）计算方式不同，不可直接互换。出口商须按 GSO/BSMD 方案注册，将标签重做为阿拉伯语和/或英语的 GSO 布局，并以 230 V、50 Hz 下实测的光效数据为基础。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GSO 能效標籤及注冊是巴林受管制 LED 照明的強制性上市前步驟，由 MOIC 下屬 BSMD 執行並通過當地進口商辦理。中國 CEL 注冊不可替代，且 GSO 標籤等級（來自 GSO 能效標準）與中國 CEL 等級（絕對 lm/W）計算方式不同，不可直接互換。出口商須按 GSO/BSMD 方案注冊，將標籤重做為阿拉伯語和/或英語的 GSO 布局，並以 230 V、50 Hz 下實測的光效數據為基礎。
